summary: Add @export_group and categorized export variables to an existing script
prompt: The script below has several hardcoded constants for enemy behavior. Convert them to @export variables organized into two @export_group sections: 'Movement' (speed, acceleration, deceleration) and 'Combat' (attack_damage, attack_range, attack_cooldown). Use appropriate types and preserve the original default values.
evaluation_notes: Must use @export_group decorator. Must use @export before each variable. Types must match original values (float for floats, etc.). Default values must match originals.
